description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-container

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-container/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 100 (A) — No issues.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Max-width, padding, gutter. Breakpoint-aware.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Landmark roles if applicable. Content reflow at zoom.
3. **Functionality** — Max-width variants (sm, md, lg, xl, full). Fluid vs fixed. Padding. Nesting.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Responsive max-widths. CSS Parts. Container queries if used.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Verify 100 holds.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Responsive. Variants.
8. **Storybook** — All size variants. Nested containers. Content examples.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Layout builder integration. Region wrapper.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-container
